#_chooseOcadDirectory: Choose directory where the OCAD file is saved
#_errorTypeUnsupportedBrowser: This browser can unfortunately not use OCADVersioner. Supported browsers are listed here: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/File_System_API#browser_compatibility
#_foundMultipleOcdFilesInDirectory: Found multiple .ocd files in selected folder. Choose the .ocd file currently in use.
#_georeferencingExplanation: This is where you define your map's georeferencing. A complete list of EPSG codes are available here
#_projectDirectorySelectorText: Welcome to OCADVersioner. A versioning tool for the map drawing program OCAD. This tools allows you to create versions of the map, and easily visualize what has changed between versions.
#_projectDirectorySelectorTextPt2: Choose the folder where the OCAD file is saved to get started
